label: Watch
llm_description: Use when the saved item is primarily video, a stream, a show, a film, a talk, or another media item the user likely wants to watch later.

label: Read
llm_description: Use when the saved item is primarily an article, post, document, newsletter, thread, book, or other text the user likely wants to read later.

label: Visit
llm_description: Use when the saved item is a place, venue, restaurant, shop, destination, or location the user likely wants to physically visit.

label: Buy
llm_description: Use when the saved item is a product, listing, deal, store page, or purchasing option the user likely wants to buy or consider buying.

label: Make
llm_description: Use when the saved item is a recipe, DIY project, craft, build guide, code pattern, workout, or other thing the user may cook, create, or perform.

label: Share
llm_description: Use when evidence suggests the user saved the item to send, show, recommend, or discuss with another person or group.

label: Plan
llm_description: Use when the saved item supports planning a trip, event, appointment, itinerary, project, deadline, or future logistics.

label: Research
llm_description: Use when the saved item is evidence for later investigation, evaluation, or decision-making, including comparing multiple options.

label: Reference
llm_description: Use when the saved item is mainly for later lookup, including contact info, pricing, measurements, instructions, receipts, screenshots, policies, or factual material.

label: Remember
llm_description: Use when the saved item preserves a fact, idea, quote, memory, preference, or context without a clearer action. Use this with lower confidence and needs_review when no specific future use is inferable.

label: Follow up
llm_description: Use only when evidence suggests a concrete next action such as call, email, message, book, reply, submit, renew, pay, or complete a task.
